creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: Expanding on the comment of "Re-adding the slog device will still results in a panic on 'bectl list'. It will also panic on boot now and will no longer fully boot to the OS.", the report in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=245649 looks similar to the observation I have after re-adding the slog device.
